info.title: Swagger documentation
info.description:
This is an API documentation for services provided by adversea.com.

You can use this API and the data it provides to perform screening / background checks for people or companies.

Every endpoint requires an API key. To obtain an API key, please visit your profile page on https://adversea.com/profile and generate an API key for yourself.


Your API key uses will not be decreased by responses that are 4xx or 5xx

tags.name: Adversea global entity services
tags.description: Services designed to work with global data.

tags.name: Adversea regional screening services
tags.description: Services designed to work best in a specific region. Please contact us for information about covered regions and the possibility to extend a specific service to your region.

tags.name: Adversea global screening services
tags.description: Services designed to work with global data.

tags.name: Adversea client administration endpoints
tags.description: Endpoints for clients to manage their own account, such as checking remaining credit balance.

get.description:
Analyze results from various search engines. Includes results from Google, Bing and other popular search engines.

Can be reduced to analyze only internet media with the boolean flag mediaOnly.

The result is in a form of simple and concise human readable text analysis for each analyzed URL.

parameters.name: targetName
parameters.description: Name of the screening entity. Can't be number or a phone number.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description:
Country of origin of websites used for screening. Increases accuracy.

If you do not find a country of origin that would cover your needs, please contact us on info@adversea.com

parameters.name: outputLanguage
parameters.description: Output language of the generated data.

parameters.name: mediaOnly
parameters.description: Focus the analysis only on internet media. Useful if you want to focus on adverse media screening

parameters.name: forceRecreate
parameters.description: Force adversea to update all parts of the response with the latest data and bypass cache. Requests with this parameter set to true are generally slower but work with the latest data.

500.description: Adversea server error. In case of this response, don't hesitate to contact us for help.

200.description: Successfully perform the request and receive a data object.

400.description: Bad request, most likely incorrect input.

get.description:
Analyze results from various search engines. Includes results from Google, Bing and other popular search engines.

Can be reduced to analyze only internet media with the boolean flag mediaOnly.

The result is a set of atomic claims for each analyzed URL. These claims contain simple information about the screened target.

parameters.name: targetName
parameters.description: Name of the screening entity. Can't be number or a phone number.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description:
Country of origin of websites used for screening. Increases accuracy.

If you do not find a country of origin that would cover your needs, please contact us on info@adversea.com

parameters.name: forceRecreate
parameters.description: Force adversea to update all parts of the response with the latest data and bypass cache. Requests with this parameter set to true are generally slower but work with the latest data.

500.description: Adversea server error. In case of this response, don't hesitate to contact us for help.

200.description: Successfully perform the request and receive a data object.

400.description: Bad request, most likely incorrect input.

get.description:
Performs a complex screening of an target based on publicly available internet data. Resulting report contains multiple topics. These include:

- basic_check - general information about screened target.
- political_activity - political activity of the screened target. Can be used to complement PEP checking
- legal_issues - information about court cases, fines and similar information about screened target.
- corruption - checks whether or not the screened target is associated with corruption cases.
- financial_crime - checks whether or not the screened target is associated with financial crimes, such as fraud, embezzlement etc.
- violent_crime - checks whether or not the screened target is associated with violent crimes.
- sex_crime - checks whether or not the screened target is associated with sexual crimes.

parameters.name: targetName
parameters.description: Name of the screening entity. Can't be number or a phone number.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description:
Country of origin of websites used for screening. Increases accuracy.

If you do not find a country of origin that would cover your needs, please contact us on info@adversea.com

get.description:
Identify different entities from results. The results can be from various search engines (Google, Bing and others)

The results contains a list of identified entities. Each entity contains a name, short description and links where the entity appears.

parameters.name: country
